top_patterns.description: Open with a statement or update, then include a call-to-action or link.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: frequently in updates, projects, or initiatives
example_quotes: We all start somewhere. No job is too small or idea too big. The key is to stay inspired and keep creating! Great round-up by @TIME – link in my bio if you want to check it out.

In honor of #WorldSightDay let’s spread awareness about the 285 million people that are blind or visually impaired, but 80% of them don't have to be. With access to sight-saving eye care, most of these people could regain their vision. At @TOMS we’re focused on the gift of sight – link in my bio to learn more.

top_patterns.description: Express thanks or acknowledge others, often with hashtags.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: in posts about events, collaborations, or support
example_quotes: Thank you to the men and women who serve our country. We are grateful for your service today and every day. #VeteransDay #Heroes
Honored to have talked #socialentrepreneurship with the brilliant @CTurlington at #FCNY tonight!

top_patterns.description: Share personal achievements or moments, often with emojis or casual tone.
example_quotes: Just got my first Tattoo!!! Actually got 2!! 1. The coordinates of montauk where Heather and I met. 2. The summit symbol and his name. Close ups coming :) thx @winter_stone
Summit is having trouble with his Instagram account (hahaha) so he asked me to post this for grandparents day. Happy grandparents day mom and dad from summit!

top_patterns.pattern_name: Call to Action / Link in Bio
top_patterns.description: Encourage followers to learn more via link in bio, often after sharing a story.
top_patterns.structure_template: Story + call to action + 'link in my bio'
top_patterns.when_it_appears: when promoting initiatives, stories, or resources
example_quotes: Great round-up by @TIME – link in my bio if you want to check it out.
Link to the story in my bio. #TOMS #experiencegiving

top_patterns.description: Share core beliefs or movement statements, often with a link or hashtag.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: in posts about mission, values, or movement
example_quotes: This is not a shoe, This is a movement. And here is our anthem - link in my bio
Our WHY is not One for One, that is our model. Our WHY is For One, Another. Here is how it comes to life… link to the full anthem in my bio.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Inform and direct followers to more info
example_quotes: In honor of #WorldSightDay let’s spread awareness about the 285 million people that are blind or visually impaired, but 80% of them don't have to be. With access to sight-saving eye care, most of these people could regain their vision. At @TOMS we’re focused on the gift of sight – link in my bio to learn more.
Great round-up by @TIME – link in my bio if you want to check it out.

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Share personal life in casual, engaging way
example_quotes: Just got my first Tattoo!!! Actually got 2!! 1. The coordinates of montauk where Heather and I met. 2. The summit symbol and his name. Close ups coming :) thx @winter_stone
Summit is having trouble with his Instagram account (hahaha) so he asked me to post this for grandparents day. Happy grandparents day mom and dad from summit!
Thank you to the men and women who serve our country. We are grateful for your service today and every day. #VeteransDay #Heroes
Thanks @davidlauren for the sweet #polotech  Makes working out a lot more fun and productive! @ralphlauren
This is not a shoe, This is a movement. And here is our anthem - link in my bio
Our WHY is not One for One, that is our model. Our WHY is For One, Another. Here is how it comes to life… link to the full anthem in my bio.

closers: link to the story in my bio
link in my bio to learn more
bridge_phrases: so he asked me to post this
here is how it comes to life
language_habits.line_break_style: mostly continuous, occasional line breaks for emphasis

example_quotes: Our WHY is not One for One, that is our model. Our WHY is For One, Another.
It was an honor to give AVA the $25K Social Entrepreneurship Award at yesterday's #KairosSociety Summit.
Thank you to the men and women who serve our country.
Thanks @davidlauren for the sweet #polotech
Just got my first Tattoo!!!
Summit is having trouble with his Instagram account (hahaha)
This is not a shoe, This is a movement.
Our WHY is For One, Another.

anti_patterns: Overly promotional language without personal touch
Repetitive calls to action without variation
Generic motivational quotes without personal insight

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current Instagram voice is concise, personal, and mission-driven, emphasizing social impact, gratitude, and milestones.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift from more formal or promotional to more personal and authentic storytelling.
